name: GWWAB22-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the rail routes around Cardiff and the valleys.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2022 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / GWWAB22 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89 to GWWAB22-IRF (1) (code 10215) used in conjunction with the GW22-LCC map projection (code 10211).
